overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character approaching and traversing the Bridge of Sacrifice. The scene features a dramatic apocalyptic sky with floating red embers, massive stone fortifications, and a vast cloud sea vista visible from a cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior approach to fortified stone bridge

events.description: character enters the Bridge of Sacrifice stone gate structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the massive stone gate under the red ember sky

entered.detail: massive stone fortification with two tall cylindrical towers connected by a bridge
large luminous tree with bright yellow-white foliage visible in the distance
dramatic sky filled with red and purple clouds and floating ember particles
weathered stone tile pathway leading toward the gate

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open stone approach toward the massive Bridge of Sacrifice gate structure. The sky burns with red and purple hues scattered with floating embers, while a glowing white tree stands visible to the right against the dark horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified bridge interior with hanging cages and barricades

events.description: enters the dark stone corridor of the Bridge of Sacrifice
exits the bridge structure to the cliff edge overlook

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark gate passage flanked by wooden spikes and stone walls

entered.detail: sharpened wooden stakes lining both sides of the path
metal cages suspended from the gate structure overhead
burning brazier providing warm orange light against the blue darkness

changed.to: left_mid and right_mid enclosing the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the enclosed stone corridor of the Bridge of Sacrifice, passing wooden spike barricades and hanging cages suspended overhead. The environment is dimly lit with occasional campfires as the sky becomes partially obscured by the stone structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking vast cloud sea

events.description: emerges from bridge to open cliff edge with expansive vista
character reaches cliff edge, looks out, then turns to walk back

agents.ego_description: walking to the cliff edge, observing the vast cloud sea below, then turning back toward the bridge

entered.detail: stone precipice dropping off into clouds with no visible bottom
expansive view of clouds and mist filling the valley below with floating islands visible
ruined structures and landmasses floating in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the character stands at a cliff edge overlooking a breathtaking vista of clouds and floating islands stretching into the blue distance. The glowing white tree is visible again to the left across the expanse before the character turns to retrace their steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through bridge interior toward entrance

events.description: re-enters the Bridge of Sacrifice from the cliff side

agents.ego_description: walking back through the stone corridor toward the original entrance

entered.detail: sharpened wooden stakes lining the path on both sides
burning brazier on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks back through the enclosed bridge corridor, passing the same wooden barricades and campfires now from the opposite direction. The stone gate structure looms ahead as the character approaches the original entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an open, apocalyptic wasteland through a claustrophobic stone fortification and out toward a vast celestial vista. It begins with the character walking across a stone approach under a burning red and purple sky filled with floating embers, with a glowing white tree shimmering on the horizon. As the character enters the Bridge of Sacrifice, the open sky is replaced by a dimly lit stone corridor where wooden spike barricades and hanging cages line the path. The scene then opens abruptly as the character emerges from the gate to a cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking expanse of clouds and floating islands stretching toward the distant white tree. Finally, the camera reverses direction, retracing its steps back through the enclosed corridor and past the campfires before returning toward the original stone entrance.
